scripts.setup:rare: npm install -g @rareprotocol/rare-cli && echo '✅ Rare CLI installed. Run: rare configure --chain sepolia --private-key 0x... --rpc-url https://...'
scripts.deploy:collection: rare deploy erc721 'Royal Logs' 'RLOG' --chain sepolia && echo '✅ Copy contract address to RARE_CONTRACT_ADDRESS in .env.local'
